title: Toronto Cold Snap Hits
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Toronto with a Z-Score of -3.29. The city is experiencing extremely cold conditions with a Score of 10.0/10 and a CRITICAL Level.
body:
The current weather conditions in Toronto are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a Z-Score of -3.29 indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 12.5 GG, while Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, indicating a strong demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 72% and the wind speed is at 12.9 km/h, further exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
